meaning: 沙巴区[扎伊尔行政区名](旧称加丹加省
examples: The calculation of the zircon concordia age for the Shaba migmatiticgneiss, Mianning County, is correct.
Those million-zaire notes they scoff at trade in Lubumbashi, the capital of Shaba province, at only 300, 000 to the dollar.
In staking this false claim, as it did with the Shaba Farms on Mount Dov in the Golan Heights in 2000, Lebanon is setting up a casus belli against Israel.
